Repository: phpstan/phpstan
Release: 2.1.30
Tag: 2.1.30; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-10-02T16:09:13Z; created_at: 2025-10-02T16:07:52Z
Release notes:
Improvements 🔧
=====================
* Alternative solution to disable cloning with `--prefer-source` that does not need another repository (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/commit/0eb327e751d90cd80c06d9a4c3aea8161cbbd251)
* TableErrorFormatter: Link path in JetBrain IDEs ([#4369](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4369)), thanks @vrana!
* Improve ConstantArrayType inference ([#4376](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4376)), thanks @staabm!
* use string instead of `__stringandstringable` in printf parameter error message ([#4377](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4377)), thanks @schlndh!
* Inherit PHPDoc return type in child method with narrower native return type ([#4384](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4384)), #12481, #11364, #10600, #13588
* Rely on RuleLevelHelper in InvalidKeyInArrayItemRule ([#4379](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4379)), thanks @VincentLanglet!
Bugfixes 🐛
=====================
* False positive "`non-empty-array<int, int>` might not be a list" when change existing list key ([#4351](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4351)), #13035, thanks @staabm!
* Remove duplicate method in error message ([#4371](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4371)), #12557, thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Fix "Offset (int|string) might not exist on array" after `array_keys($arr)` ([#4381](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4381)), #12926, thanks @staabm!
* Fix "offset might not exist" false-positives when offset is a expression ([#4372](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4372)), #9494, #12115, #12805, #12931, #13214, #13039, #13538, thanks @staabm!
* Skip deep expression when root expression changes while scope generalization ([#4390](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4390)), thanks @staabm!
* When assigning nested array offset, union the value with empty array if the offset might be nonexistent (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/23dc4e7633fa23dcbd20135872aa53551af2e00e), #12078, #10640, #10025, #6173
* Fix `ArrayType::hasOffsetValueType` ([#4387](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4387)), thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Fix regression about appending `[]` to existing offsets (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/f88023141d28f6e119e5470c32cae472bb4c4093), #10438
Function signature fixes 🤖
=======================
* add bcround function signature for PHP 8.4 ([#4367](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4367)), #13364, thanks @themasch!
* Remove stream_get_meta_data from delta file ([#4360](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4360)), thanks @miken32!
* Add `stream_socket_{client,server}` stubs for `@param-out` ([#4391](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4391)), #12622, #13605, thanks @msbit!
Internals 🔍
=====================
* Simplify ClassReflectionExtensions ([#4374](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4374)), thanks @staabm!
* Simplify *StatementWithoutImpurePointsRule ([#4375](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4375)), thanks @staabm!
* Cleanup `instanceof Type` checks ([#4380](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4380)), thanks @staabm!
* Replace instanceof checks in JsonThrowOnErrorDynamicReturnTypeExtension ([#4155](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4155)), thanks @Khartir!
* Added regression test ([#4382](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4382)), #12115, thanks @staabm!
* Get rid of `instanceof ErrorType` (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/3adc6253e76dbd65eb479b4933a6df8b2279c128)
* Improve CombinationHelper PHPDoc ([#4386](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4386)), thanks @VincentLanglet!
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the phpstan/phpstan release 2.1.30, improvements include an alternative solution to disable cloning with --prefer-source, TableErrorFormatter linking paths in JetBrain IDEs, improved ConstantArrayType inference, and inheriting PHPDoc return types in child methods with narrower native return types. Bugfixes address false positives for non-empty-array list checks, duplicate method error messages, offset existence after array_keys, and offset might not exist false-positives. Function signature fixes add bcround for PHP 8.4, remove stream_get_meta_data from delta, and add stream_socket_client/server stubs for param-out.

Bleeding edge 🔪

* AssignToByRefExprFromForeachRule (level 1) (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/0624342656d2770c99853d0a468304b4348bd129), #13625, #11120
* Validate curl_setopt_array parameter array ([#4395](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4395)), #13615, thanks @staabm!
* Restrict accepted args of `php_uname()` ([#4359](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4359)), thanks @dktapps!
* `array_rand()` requires a `non-empty-array` as of PHP 8 ([#4397](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4397)), thanks @staabm!
* Report implicit (inherited) too-wide `@throws` type (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/3eaad7f46dc6d732e47e3086dabceddf14abc16f)
*If you want to see the shape of things to come and adopt bleeding edge features early, you can include this config file in your project's `phpstan.neon`:*
```
includes:
- vendor/phpstan/phpstan/conf/bleedingEdge.neon
```
*Of course, there are no backwards compatibility guarantees when you include this file. The behaviour and reported errors can change in minor versions with this file included. [Learn more](https://phpstan.org/blog/what-is-bleeding-edge)*
Improvements 🔧
=====================
* New config parameter `exceptions.check.throwTypeCovariance` (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/3f7e878a5477bdf2e0804f39c8a6c2e949dffdb6), #13649
* New config parameter `checkTooWideThrowTypesInProtectedAndPublicMethods` (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/9fc483d89412b79c9caf085c39689c6310fcdef6), #13258
* + made TooWideMethodThrowTypeRule behaviour similar to TooWideMethodReturnTypehintRule
* + made TooWidePropertyHookThrowTypeRule to be similar to TooWideMethodReturnTypehintRule (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/67ef20bea0ca5855f5500b2b28a2d3c17cc0cde1)
* Useful tip about what `@throws` should be added when the implicit one is too wide (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/803104076c690dfcffd9ddbb6d3318d74e1cb527)
* Relax strict printf parameter check ([#4400](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4400)), thanks @schlndh!
* Support union types in curl_setopt validation ([#4396](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4396)), thanks @staabm!
* Do not report non existent offset for invalid ones ([#4398](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4398)), thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Report float and null offset based on PHP version ([#4406](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4406)), #13592, thanks @VincentLanglet!
Bugfixes 🐛
=====================
* Fix list type lost in for loop ([#4403](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4403)), #12807, thanks @staabm!
* Improve support of FILTER_REQUIRE_ARRAY ([#4410](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4410)), #11863, thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Add VersionCompareFunctionDynamicThrowTypeExtension ([#4408](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4408)), #13515, thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Fix `OversizedArrayType::isSubTypeOf()` ([#4407](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4407)), #13509, thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Fix "array_rand() - offset might not exists" ([#4383](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4383)), #12981, thanks @staabm!
* Avoid crashing on enum without value (#4336) ([#4336](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4336)), #7927, thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Special-case LateResolvableType in `UnionType::isSuperTypeOf()` (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/47a820bf3d43e29140592eec84a1cf36530e0625), #13652, #11033
* Object with dynamic property assignments cannot report too-wide types on properties (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/851ab2c3f6151ca0a12bbceaa063ed0fd162e4cb), #13624
* Setting array offset on a property should pick types from original UnionType still present in the current property typ...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the phpstan/phpstan release 2.1.31, bleeding edge features include AssignToByRefExprFromForeachRule, curl_setopt_array parameter validation, restricting accepted args of php_uname, requiring non-empty-array for array_rand in PHP 8, and reporting implicit too-wide @throws types. Improvements add config parameters exceptions.check.throwTypeCovariance and checkTooWideThrowTypesInProtectedAndPublicMethods, relax strict printf parameter check, support union types in curl_setopt validation, and report float and null offsets based on PHP version. Bugfixes fix list type loss in for loops, improve FILTER_REQUIRE_ARRAY support, add VersionCompareFunctionDynamicThrowTypeExtension, fix OversizedArrayType::isSubTypeOf, and avoid crashing on enum without value.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the phpstan/phpstan release 2.1.32, improvements add PHP 8.5 support including pipe operator, deprecated casts, deprecated backtick operator, PHP_BUILD_DATE type, global constants attributes, FILTER_THROW_ON_FAILURE for filter_var, array_first and array_last return type extensions, deprecated traits, #[Override] on properties, clone with support, Closure::getCurrent, casts in constant expressions, first class callables in constant expressions, static Closures in constant expressions, and asymmetric visibility in static properties. Release notes:
Improvements 🔧
=====================

* OversizedArray is not truthy ([#4556](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4556)), #13797, thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Do not instantiate Accessory without string type ([#4550](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4550)), #13784, thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Narrow CURLOPT_SHARE accepting type ([#4611](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4611)), thanks @staabm!
Function signature fixes 🤖
=======================

* Fix DOMNode::C14N bad definition ([#4361](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4361)), #8096, thanks @VincentLanglet!

Internals 🔍
=====================
* Simplify ClassReflection constructor (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/821ff7621fc23267b0e6d08b8ee5c699fea8714f)
* Introduce ClassReflectionFactory (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/35470a04099e599d889d69c2c7bda0056b552600)

* Reduce ContainerFactory::postInitializeContainer() calls ([#4572](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4572)), thanks @staabm!
* TypeSpecifier as an interface (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/fc6a2b1297d275ef82138b36f4773c52134f1770)
* Change where TypeSpecifier is set into TypeSpecifierAwareExtension (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/36cf9a1324004f9a4f25a1b9904a63e7d72a5eb9)
* Enable FileCacheStorage for OptimizedDirectorySourceLocatorFactory in tests ([#4576](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4576)), thanks @staabm!
* Upload baseline on downgraded code (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/057c79f9458b355c7f2c8ea2a2d63c5cd307c9d6)
* More precise return type for gatherAssertTypes ([#4614](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4614)), thanks @staabm!

Release: 2.1.34
Tag: 2.1.34; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-01-19T19:53:13Z; created_at: 2026-01-19T19:52:17Z
Release notes:
Major new features 🚀
=====================
* **Optimized performance** 🏎️
* Caching of reflection objects and resolved PHPDocs
* Many raw performance optimization tweaks in analyser code (thanks @staabm!)
* Projects typically see 25 % to 40 % faster analysis times. Please test this release and report back, we're looking forward to your numbers as well!
* **Utilization of Fibers for more precise analysis** (PHP 8.1+)
* Code like `doFoo($a = 1, $a)` will see better type inference for 2nd call argument.
* When a rule hooked onto MethodCall AST node asks for `$scope->getType($node->args[1])`, without Fibers it gets `mixed`, because `$scope` sees the state before the method call.
* Fibers allow PHPStan to "pause" the execution of the rule until the precise type of `$node->args[1]` is available in the analyser.
* When the 2nd argument is processed, the execution of the rule is resumed and `$scope->getType($node->args[1])` sees `1` as the type, not `mixed`.
* Solves 10 reported issues: https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/issues/12234, https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/issues/11982, https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/issues/11386, https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/issues/11079, https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/issues/10612, https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/issues/9652, https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/issues/8936, https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/issues/12663, https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/issues/12735, https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/issues/13353
Improvements 🔧
=====================
* Add ArrayCountValuesDynamicReturnTypeExtension ([#4615](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4615)), #13816, thanks @mad-briller!
Bugfixes 🐛
=====================
* Fix `UnionType::getObjectClassReflections` ([#4541](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4541)), #13777, thanks @VincentLanglet!
* `count(non-empty-array, COUNT_RECURSIVE)` is `int<1, max>` ([#4515](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4515)), thanks @staabm!
* Fix bitwise operators on mixed ([#4423](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4423)), #8094, thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Immediate unwrap AlwaysRememberedExpr after used on NodeScopeResolver ([#4651](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4651)), thanks @samsonasik!
* Improve return type of `range()` function to always yield a `non-empty-list` ([#4688](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4688)), thanks @FeBe95!
* Fix ArgumentsNormalizer - do not overwrite already passed args (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/7bdd17221f67b9e7e55741f5e9cb67d9f8232ce2)
* Prevent crash when analysing curl_setopt ([#4722](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4722)), thanks @schlndh!
* Fix the handling of sealed concrete classes ([#4567](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4567)), #13734, thanks @stof!
* Improve and sync Accessory types `accepts()` methods ([#4766](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4766)), #13964, thanks @staabm!
Performance 🏎️
=======================
* Prevent unnecessary scope merging ([#4640](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4640)), thanks @staabm!
* Prevent reading & json-decoding composer.json multiple times ([#4645](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4645)), thanks @staabm!
* Cache neon file reads ([#4646](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4646)), thanks @staabm!
* Optimize keepVoidType (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/ff3922084b90aa4ca53dcc1f4037fb00758cdde9)
* TypeCombinator - assume that inner types in UnionType are already normalized (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/e8f999276855d7673b19b67a49b693aec24e51c4)
* Remember resolved types after pushInFunctionCall ([#4648](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4648)), thanks @staabm!

Improvements add ArrayCountValuesDynamicReturnTypeExtension. * Don't lose known offset-types in `array_merge()` ([#4554](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4554)), thanks @staabm!
Bugfixes 🐛
=====================
* Fixed escaped hash in regex extended mode ([#4814](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4814)), thanks @dg!
* Fix closure type inference bug related to FNSR (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/66f273854b8a46e6e8caff20121a3afed1dd0103), #13993
Performance 🏎️
=====================
* Rework phpDoc inheritance to resolve through reflection instead of re-walking the hierarchy ([#4829](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4829)), #10771
* TemplateTypeHelper: prevent unnecessary work ([#4818](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4818)), thanks @staabm!
* ConstantArrayType: prevent unnecessary work ([#4811](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4811)), thanks @staabm!
* ImpossibleCheckTypeHelper: Remove unnecessary late-resolving ([#4816](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4816)), thanks @staabm!
* Prevent duplicate logic execution for `createMethod` with `includingAnnotations: true` if `@method` does not exist (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/d5da11eeadec1c3b9b745df4fd2e8318d4864401)
* Find all constant/method types per class at once ([#4737](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4737)), thanks @staabm!
* Speed up CombinationHelper ([#4825](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4825)), thanks @kaja47!
* MutatingScope: Faster createConditionalExpressions ([#4831](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4831)), thanks @staabm!
* Re-use ExpressionTypeHolder ([#4832](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4832)), thanks @staabm!
* IntersectionType cannot be void ([#4835](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4835)), thanks @staabm!
* Cache IntersectionType results (#4836) ([#4836](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4836)), thanks @staabm!
* Prevent unnecessary work in MutatingScope->mergeVariableHolders() ([#4837](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4837)), thanks @staabm!
* Simplify lowercase-string handling (#4838) ([#4838](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4838)), thanks @staabm!
Function signature fixes 🤖
=======================
* NodeDependencies: cache normalized filenames (#4815) ([#4815](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4815)), thanks @staabm!
Internals 🔍
=====================
* Clarify `new PhpPropertyReflection` call with named arguments (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/0f6f059810c86bc23ada1ccb5b0599dec5e9e411)
* Narrow type of reflection `get*Type()` after calling `has*Type()` ([#4806](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4806)), thanks @paulbalandan!
* Add regression test ([#4824](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4824)), #11598, thanks @takaram!
* No need to have generics in class constant-related messages ([#4829](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4829)), #10771

Bugfixes fix escaped hash in regex extended mode and closure type inference bug related to FNSR. Repository: phpstan/phpstan
Release: 2.1.41
Tag: 2.1.41; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-16T18:27:01Z; created_at: 2026-03-16T18:24:10Z
Release notes:
Just three weeks after [PHPStan 2.1.40](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan/releases/tag/2.1.40), this release fixes whopping **87 issues**! 🎉
Major new features 🚀
=====================
* [Main documentation page on phpstan.org](https://phpstan.org/documentation) is now a dashboard linking the most common problem-solving pages
* All error identifiers reported by PHPStan now have [comprehensive documentation](https://phpstan.org/error-identifiers).
* Each page shows a code example reporting the error
* Followed by an explanation why is it reported
* And showing one or more ways how to fix it
* Several awesome examples: [`ternary.resultUnused`](https://phpstan.org/error-identifiers/ternary.resultUnused), [`property.onlyRead`](https://phpstan.org/error-identifiers/property.onlyRead), [`return.void`](https://phpstan.org/error-identifiers/return.void)
* [Documentation about custom extensions](https://phpstan.org/developing-extensions/extension-types) now documents all previously-undocumented extension types
Improvements 🔧
=====================
* Add option `reportIgnoresWithoutComments` to report ignores without comments ([#5032](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/5032)), #11340, thanks @calebdw!
* This disables `@phpstan-ignore` without comments in parentheses
* It also disables `@phpstan-ignore-line` and `@phpstan-ignore-next-line` completely
* See: https://phpstan.org/config-reference#reportignoreswithoutcomments
* Tuned how many CPU cores PHPStan uses by default:
* Diminishing returns beyond 8 CPU cores (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/23928d9cf2a09461e58670fd6fd2bed7a90448b8)
* Different method to compute CPU cores to use (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/89f138269e2699e65d81497fd01aaa384e699702), #11410, #7479
* See docs: https://phpstan.org/config-reference#parallel-processing
* Solve various HTTP proxy and custom root CA errors when downloading PHPStan Pro
* Use plain old Guzzle and system CA (https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/commit/a3af1cde2db0b9a0c4cb8c6df6e08082a89e4530), #12486, #11244
* Report invalid printf placeholder ([#4478](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4478)), #1889, #8547, thanks @VincentLanglet!
* Respect rule level in ParameterCastableToNumberRule ([#4873](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/4873)), thanks @VincentLanglet!

=====================
* **Unsealed array shapes** ([#5501](https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan-src/pull/5501)), #13565, #8438, #11494, #12110, #14032
